title: Mandeep Singh
content:
Mandeep Singh - AI/ML Engineer & Full Stack Developer
Bio: Pursuing M.E. in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at Chandigarh University. I architect intelligent systems at the intersection of AI research and production engineering. From training neural networks to deploying cloud-native applications, I build things that matter.
Location: Bhiwani, Haryana, India
Roles: AI/ML Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Cloud Architect, Data Scientist, Flutter Developer
Available for work: Yes

title: portfolio
content:
Project: portfolio
Description: 
Details: 
Category: Full Stack Web Development, Generative AI
Difficulty: Advanced
Recruiter Summary: Developed a production-ready, full-stack AI-powered portfolio using Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript, integrating Gemini for an interactive AI assistant with RAG capabilities. Implemented robust features including server-side authenticated admin for content management, persistent data storage with Upstash Redis, and Vercel Blob for secure resume uploads. This project demonstrates strong expertise in modern web development, scalable architecture, and advanced AI integration, effectively showcasing dynamic skills and project experiences.
Problem Solved: This project solves the problem of effectively and interactively showcasing a developer's skills, projects, and experience to potential employers through a dynamic and AI-enhanced platform.
Complexity Score: 85/100
Technology: 
Skills Demonstrated: TypeScript, Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js, Gemini API Integration, Upstash Redis, Vercel Blob, Full Stack Development, Server-Side Validation, Authentication, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), Web Streams API

original.name: portfolio
original.readmeSummary: Developed a production-ready, full-stack AI-powered portfolio using Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript, integrating Gemini for an interactive AI assistant with RAG capabilities. ...
original.title: portfolio
original.category: Full Stack Web Development, Generative AI
keyFeatures: Responsive animated portfolio with projects, skills, experience, and education
Floating "Mandeep AI" assistant with streaming responses
Grounded portfolio retrieval and structured tool calling
Project, resume, contact, and Calendly result cards
Session-scoped chat history, retry, stop generation, and Markdown rendering
Protected /admin content editor with server-side validation
Persistent production content through Upstash Redis
PDF resume uploads through Vercel Blob
Local retrieval and content fallbacks for development
original.recruiterSummary: Developed a production-ready, full-stack AI-powered portfolio using Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript, integrating Gemini for an interactive AI assistant with RAG capabilities. Implemented robust features including server-side authenticated admin for content management, persistent data storage with Upstash Redis, and Vercel Blob for secure resume uploads. This project demonstrates strong expertise in modern web development, scalable architecture, and advanced AI integration, effectively showcasing dynamic skills and project experiences.
original.problemSolved: This project solves the problem of effectively and interactively showcasing a developer's skills, projects, and experience to potential employers through a dynamic and AI-enhanced platform.
learningOutcomes: Implementing a full-stack Next.js application with TypeScript and modern UI frameworks.
Integrating advanced AI capabilities (Gemini, RAG) for interactive user experiences.
Building secure, authenticated admin interfaces with robust server-side validation.
Managing persistent data using external services like Upstash Redis and Vercel Blob.
Developing responsive and animated user interfaces with Framer Motion and Three.js.
Understanding and utilizing Web Streams API for real-time, streaming data responses.
Configuring and deploying complex Next.js applications to production environments (e.g., Vercel).

title: Celestial Bodies Database
content:
Project: Celestial Bodies Database
Description: Starting
Details: Designed a full PostgreSQL database schema for celestial bodies including galaxies, stars, planets, and moons. Used Bash scripting for data ingestion automation, complex SQL queries, and reporting.

Difficulty: Beginner
Recruiter Summary: This foundational project, part of the freeCodeCamp RDBMS curriculum, demonstrates early proficiency in relational database management systems and SQL. It highlights the ability to set up and interact with databases using shell scripting, establishing a solid base in data persistence and querying.
Problem Solved: It addresses the fundamental challenge of acquiring practical skills in relational database management and SQL for beginners.
Complexity Score: 5/100
Technology: PostgreSQL, Bash, SQL, Linux
Skills Demonstrated: SQL, Shell Scripting, Relational Database Concepts, Basic Data Manipulation
